title: Un-Ify
description: Un-do that accidental path or tilling with Un-ify
body:
Un-ify allows a player to simply un-do certain in game actions. Currently this supports Tilling, Pathing, and Stripping.

Un-doing the action is as simple as right clicking the block with whatever tool would do the action to begin with. So right clicking on farmland with a hoe will turn it into dirt, and with a shovel grass path will be turned back into grass.

The player can disable the behavior by running /undotoggle.
It can then be re-enabled via the same command.

If you only want certain actions able to be undone, you can toggle specific ones off in the config.


This plugin uses anonymous bstats metrics.
